title: Manual Processes Do Not Scale Operationally

sections.content: If a process requires a human every time, it will eventually fail. Humans forget steps, skip checks, and make inconsistent decisions.
Critical operations should be automated: backups, deployments, incident response, and cleanup tasks. Automation turns best practices into guaranteed practices.
Humans design systems; machines execute procedures. Manual operations create hidden operational debt.
Automate anything you cannot afford to do wrong.
